description: A painting of a young girl or woman in a dark dress and bonnet seated on a chestnut brown horse against a dramatic dark cloudy sky. The horse stands in a three-quarter pose with its head turned slightly. The rider holds the reins and sits upright with composed posture. The background is stormy and moody, with dark tones dominating. The brushwork is loose and energetic, particularly in the rendering of the horse's body and the turbulent sky.
